# Syscoin LLM Context Bundle

> A curated, LLM-friendly plaintext bundle of Syscoin's canonical documentation, protocol specifications, developer references, and operational guides.


Use this index for lightweight discovery, then load llms-full.txt for full inline context.

## Full Context
- [llms-full.txt](llms-full.txt): Expanded context bundle with source-attributed content.

## Node / Core
- [Syscoin Core – Docs](https://github.com/syscoin/syscoin): GitHub repository (master branch/ref).

## Protocol – NEVM (EVM Layer)
- [Syscoin NEVM – EVM integration docs](https://github.com/syscoin/syscoin): GitHub repository (master branch/ref).

## Protocol – Z-DAG
- [Z-DAG Overview](llms-full.txt): Inlined in llms-full.txt.

## Protocol – Rollux (L2)
- [Rollux – L2 documentation](https://github.com/sys-labs/rollux): GitHub repository (main branch/ref).

## Protocol – Rollux Docs
- [Rollux Docs](https://docs.rollux.com): Crawl root for official docs.

## Protocol – ZK Network
- [Syscoin ZK Network – zksync-era](https://github.com/sidhujag/zksync-era): GitHub repository (main branch/ref).

## Specs – SyIPs
- [Syscoin Improvement Proposals (SyIPs)](https://github.com/syscoin/syips): GitHub repository (main branch/ref).

## Official Docs
- [Syscoin Official Docs](https://docs.syscoin.org): Crawl root for official docs.

## Developer – RPC & CLI
- [Syscoin Core – RPC & CLI reference](https://github.com/syscoin/syscoin): GitHub repository (master branch/ref).

## Developer – JS SDK
- [syscoinjs-lib – JavaScript SDK](https://github.com/syscoin/syscoinjs-lib): GitHub repository (master branch/ref).

## Developer – Rosetta API
- [Syscoin Rosetta API](https://github.com/syscoin/syscoin-rosetta): GitHub repository (master branch/ref).

## Developer – MetaMask Snap
- [Syscoin MetaMask Snap](https://github.com/syscoin/syscoin-snap): GitHub repository (main branch/ref).

## Developer – Pali Wallet
- [Pali Wallet](https://github.com/syscoin/pali-wallet): GitHub repository (main branch/ref).

## Developer – Syscoin Bridge
- [Syscoin Bridge](https://github.com/syscoin/syscoin-bridge): GitHub repository (main branch/ref).

## Node – Sentinel / Masternodes
- [Syscoin Sentinel](https://github.com/syscoin/sentinel): GitHub repository (master branch/ref).

## Operations – Docker
- [Syscoin Docker images](https://github.com/syscoin/docker-syscoin-core): GitHub repository (master branch/ref).

## Reference – Network Parameters
- [Syscoin Network Parameters](llms-full.txt): Inlined in llms-full.txt.

## Reference – NEVM Quick Reference
- [Syscoin NEVM / EVM Quick Reference](llms-full.txt): Inlined in llms-full.txt.

## Reference – zkSYS Stack / zk-hardhat
- [zkSYS Stack / zk-hardhat Quick Reference](llms-full.txt): Inlined in llms-full.txt.

## Ecosystem – Blog Highlights
- [Syscoin Blog – selected posts](https://syscoin.org/news/syscoin-platform-upgrade): Canonical web page.

- [Syscoin Blog – selected posts](https://syscoin.org/news/syscoin-4-4-launch): Canonical web page.
- [Syscoin Blog – selected posts](https://syscoin.org/news/z-dag-explained): Canonical web page.
